title: VelocityMC
description:
VMC – High-Performance Optimization for Minecraft
VMC is a performance-focused optimization mod engineered to enhance the efficiency and responsiveness of Minecraft without altering core gameplay mechanics. Built for both modded and vanilla enviromnt
body:
This pack includes a hand-picked selection of optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and more, along with QoL tweaks that enhance responsiveness without changing core gameplay. Whether you're building, exploring, or fighting mobs, FastMC ensures the best vanilla-like experience with maximum performance.

✅ Boosted FPS
✅ Shorter load times
✅ Reduced lag spikes
✅ Clean, vanilla-friendly look

Perfect for players who want performance without the fluff.
